title: Lazy Wynn Spell Caster
description: A mod that lets you easily cast spells using macros in wynncraft.
body:
This mod improves your Wynncraft experience by adding spell macros. 

# Fast Casting
This mod utilizes buffers to be able to cast as fast as possible. With a 2ms padding on the default 85ms delay setting. The next spell immediately starts casting after a spell is done aslong as the button is held down.

This is confirmed to be allowed.
